Description: Continuous layups focusing on footwork and using both hands right under the basket.
One-handed shooting close to the basket to build muscle memory and correct form.
Dribbling two basketballs simultaneously while keeping eyes up.
Tapping the ball off the backboard continuously from one side of the rim to the other without landing.
Receiving passes and shooting 3-pointers from 5 different spots on the perimeter.
Practicing standard post moves from the low block against a pad or defender.
Running pick and rolls against a defense and practicing reads (pass to roller, kick out, or score).
